title: D1 Shared Schema Migration — populate @fabric/shared with zod schemas
description: Populate the currently empty @fabric/shared package with zod schemas for AgentsMeta, LedgerEntry (discriminated union source:'ai'|'human'), HumanLockEntry, FabricConfig, ForensicReport, and InitContext. Update packages/server and packages/cli to import types from @fabric/shared instead of local duplicates. Add workspace dependency declarations in both package.json files.

files.change: Migrate AgentsMeta definition from packages/server/src/meta-reader.ts; export AgentsMeta interface + agentsMetaSchema zod validator
Define AiLedgerEntry (source:'ai') and HumanLedgerEntry (source:'human') as discriminated union; backward-compat: records missing source default to 'human'
Migrate HumanLockEntry from packages/cli/src/commands/human-lint.ts L12-17; export HumanLockEntry interface + zod schema
Migrate FabricConfig from packages/cli/src/config/resolver.ts; export FabricConfig interface + fabricConfigSchema
New schema: ForensicReport with framework {kind, version, subkind, evidence[]}, topology, entry_points[], code_samples[], recommendations_for_skill[]; version field for schema evolution
New schema: InitContext with framework, architecture_patterns[], invariants[] (type:'ban'|'require'|'protect'), domain_groups[], interview_trail[]; forensic_ref string

files.target: Dashboard SSE event type discriminated union
files.change: Define FabricEvent = MetaChangedEvent | LedgerAppendedEvent | HumanLockChangedEvent discriminated by type field; export for use by server api/events.ts and dashboard frontend
Replace empty export{} with re-exports of all schemas: export * from './schemas/agents-meta', ledger-entry, human-lock, fabric-config, forensic-report, init-context, events
Remove local AgentsMeta definition; import AgentsMeta from '@fabric/shared'
Remove local LedgerEntry schema; import LedgerEntry from '@fabric/shared'; add source:'ai' to all written entries
Remove local HumanLockEntry definition; import from '@fabric/shared'
Import LedgerEntry from '@fabric/shared'; add source:'human' to all written entries

implementation: Create packages/shared/src/schemas/ directory with all 7 schema files: agents-meta.ts, ledger-entry.ts, human-lock.ts, fabric-config.ts, forensic-report.ts, init-context.ts, events.ts
For each schema file: define TypeScript interface + corresponding zod schema; ensure backward-compat in ledger-entry (missing source field defaults to 'human' via z.default)
Update packages/shared/src/index.ts to re-export all schemas
Update packages/server/src/meta-reader.ts and tools/append-intent.ts to import from @fabric/shared and remove local type duplicates
Update packages/cli/src/commands/human-lint.ts, ledger-append.ts to import from @fabric/shared and add source field
Add workspace:* dependency in packages/server/package.json and packages/cli/package.json
Run pnpm install to link the workspace package, then pnpm -r build to verify no type errors

reference.examples: Mirror the AgentsMeta shape from server/meta-reader.ts:L6-31; mirror LedgerEntry fields from append-intent.ts:L9-15 + ledger-append.ts:L13-19 for the union

criteria: pnpm -r build passes with zero TypeScript errors
packages/server and packages/cli contain no local duplicate definitions of AgentsMeta, LedgerEntry, HumanLockEntry, FabricConfig
packages/shared/src/index.ts exports all 7 schemas (agents-meta, ledger-entry, human-lock, fabric-config, forensic-report, init-context, events)
LedgerEntry discriminated union: zod.safeParse validates both {source:'ai',...} and {source:'human',...} entries; entries missing source parse successfully defaulting to 'human'
pnpm install links @fabric/shared workspace package to server and cli without errors

rationale.chosen_approach: Create all schema files in packages/shared first, then update consumers to import from shared — minimizes intermediate broken states
alternatives_considered: Migrate one schema at a time per consumer PR (slower but lower risk)
Keep types local and add a shared re-export layer (fails to consolidate)
decision_factors: Eliminate type duplication before Dashboard adds more consumers
rationale.tradeoffs: One larger migration commit vs incremental; mitigated by doing shared schemas before any API code is written

manual_checks: After pnpm install: run pnpm -r build and confirm zero errors
grep -r 'AgentsMeta' packages/server/src packages/cli/src — should only appear as import, not interface/type definition
Run existing test suite: pnpm -r test — should all pass (no behavior changes, only import source changes)
success_metrics: Zero TypeScript compilation errors across all packages
Zero duplicate type definitions in server/cli
pnpm -r test passes without new failures
unit: Existing type tests in packages/server and packages/cli pass unchanged

risks.description: Circular workspace dependency if shared imports from server or cli
risks.mitigation: shared has no imports from server/cli — only zod and typescript stdlib
risks.fallback: If accidentally introduced, remove the import and extract the shared type to shared directly
